overall.description: Gameplay footage from a stealth video game showing a bald agent in a suit exploring a dark, luxurious gothic library with wooden bookshelves and a fireplace. The character observes NPCs including a child, maid, and butler on the main floor before ascending a grand staircase to explore the upper library level.

scene_state.functional_zone: main library floor with fireplace and seating area

events.description: child enters from right side and walks toward the armchair
child sits down in the leather armchair near the fireplace

agents.ego_description: standing near the fireplace watching the child enter and sit down, then beginning to turn and survey the room

notable_agents.action: child walks into room and sits in leather armchair

entered.detail: large stone fireplace with burning fire and ornate mantel
tall dark wood bookshelves filled with books lining the walls
burgundy leather armchair with wooden frame
large patterned oriental rug covering the wooden floor
tall arched windows with diamond panes letting in natural light

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a dimly lit gothic library with a burning fireplace. A child enters and sits in a leather armchair while the player character observes from near the hearth. Natural light filters through tall arched windows in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: central library hall with desk, pool table, and staff

events.description: character walks toward antique gramophone and executive desk area
character turns back toward main hall and approaches the maid and butler

agents.ego_description: walking through the main hall, examining the gramophone and desk, then approaching the maid and butler near the bookshelves

notable_agents.action: maid in uniform cleaning the floor with a mop
butler in formal attire standing near the bookshelves

entered.detail: vintage gramophone with large brass horn on wooden stand
large wooden executive desk with papers and desk lamp
green felt pool table with wooden frame
antique terrestrial globe on wooden stand

segments.scene_description: The character moves through the central library hall, passing an antique gramophone and executive desk. The scene reveals a pool table and large globe as the character approaches a maid cleaning the floor and a butler standing near the bookshelves.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand wooden staircase connecting main floor to upper library

events.description: character begins ascending the grand wooden staircase
character reaches upper level where large chandelier becomes visible

agents.ego_description: climbing the grand wooden staircase toward the upper library level

entered.detail: wide wooden staircase with dark steps and ornate railings
large illuminated crystal chandelier hanging from the ceiling
dark wood balustrade along the staircase

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a grand wooden staircase, leaving the main hall behind. As the character climbs, a large crystal chandelier comes into view, illuminating the upper level approach.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper library balcony with bookshelves and reading nooks

events.description: character emerges onto upper balcony overlooking the main floor below
character walks along balcony railing looking down at the lower level

agents.ego_description: walking along the upper balcony, looking down at the main floor, then proceeding toward the back of the upper library

notable_agents.action: person sitting at desk reading in the upper library area

entered.detail: wooden railing overlooking the lower floor of the library
closed wooden door at the end of the upper hallway

segments.scene_description: The character explores the upper library level, walking along a balcony that overlooks the main floor below. The space features floor-to-ceiling bookshelves and a person reading at a desk. The character moves toward a closed wooden door at the end of the hall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dimly lit gothic library that transitions from the intimate warmth of a hearth to the expansive height of an upper gallery. It begins near a burning fireplace where a child settles into a leather armchair, with natural light filtering through distant arched windows. As the camera moves through the central hall, the environment opens up to reveal an antique gramophone, a pool table, and staff members tending to the room. The scene then shifts upward as the character ascends a grand wooden staircase, passing under the glow of a large crystal chandelier that illuminates the path. Finally, the perspective expands along an upper balcony overlooking the main floor, gliding past floor-to-ceiling bookshelves and a reading desk toward a closed wooden door at the end of the hall.
